meaningVi: kiên cường, có khả năng phục hồi
example: She remained resilient despite many setbacks.

meaningVi: tỉ mỉ, cẩn thận từng chi tiết
example: He keeps meticulous notes for every meeting.
The contract language was deliberately ambiguous.

meaningVi: thực dụng, thiên về thực tế
example: We need a pragmatic solution, not a perfect one.

They made substantial progress this quarter.
Change is inevitable in a growing company.
